name: Smokeball Legal Practice Management API
what_it_does: Smokeball REST API for legal practice management, document automation, and time capture for small to mid-size law firms. Enables AI agents to manage matter and case management workflow for law firm practice management, handle automatic time capture and legal billing for attorney time management, access document generation and template automation for legal document workflow, retrieve court deadline and critical date management for docket control, manage client communication and email threading for legal client management, handle trust accounting and IOLTA compliance for legal financial management, access legal form library and court form automation for state-specific practice areas, retrieve billing and invoicing workflow for attorney revenue management, manage retainer and payment collection for law firm financial operations, and integrate Smokeball data with QuickBooks, payment processors, and legal research platforms.
use_cases: Automating time capture from legal billing agents
Managing matter workflows from legal practice agents
Generating legal documents from document automation agents
Tracking deadlines from docket management agents
not_for: Large law firms (100+ attorneys) without small/mid-size focus
Corporate legal departments without law firm practice management
Non-legal businesses without attorney billing context
best_when: A small to mid-size law firm using Smokeball wants AI agents to automate time capture, document generation, deadline tracking, trust accounting, and billing workflow.
avoid_when: LEGAL ETHICS RISK: Law firm client data is attorney-client privileged — automated data access must respect privilege boundaries and not create inadvertent disclosure. Trust accounting automation must comply with state bar IOLTA rules (every state varies); automated trust fund transfers without bar rule compliance creates disciplinary and financial risk. Smokeball automatic time capture (AI-powered) creates billing accuracy responsibility — automated bill generation from AI time capture requires attorney review before client transmission.

auth.notes: Smokeball uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.smokeball.com. Webhooks for matter and billing events. REST API with JSON. Chicago, Illinois HQ (US operations). Smokeball also in Australia and UK. Private (VC-backed: APA Financial Services, Temper Capital). Founded 2010 (Melbourne, Australia). 20,000+ law firms. Strong in US, AU, UK small law firm market. Competes with Clio, MyCase, and PracticePanther for small law firm practice management.

pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-user subscription; tier by features
pricing.notes: Chicago/Melbourne. Smokeball private VC. Founded 2010. 20,000+ law firms. US, AU, UK markets. Competes with Clio, MyCase, and PracticePanther for small law firm software.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL ETHICS RISK: Attorney-client privileged matter data; automated access must respect privilege boundaries and comply with ABA Model Rules on confidentiality

Trust accounting IOLTA compliance — automated trust fund movements must comply with state bar IOLTA rules; each state has specific trust accounting requirements; automated transfers without bar rule validation creates disciplinary risk
AI time capture billing accuracy — Smokeball auto-captures time from activity; automated bill generation from AI-captured time requires attorney review for billing accuracy and reasonableness
Court deadline criticality — automated docket deadline management for court filing deadlines is malpractice-sensitive; missed deadlines from automation errors create professional liability
Multi-jurisdiction bar compliance — Smokeball serves US, AU, and UK; bar rules differ by jurisdiction; legal practice automation must apply jurisdiction-specific compliance rules
Client trust account segregation — each client trust account must be maintained separately per bar rules; automated trust accounting must maintain proper account segregation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Legal practice management. SOC2. OAuth2. US/AU/UK. Attorney-client privileged matter and financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal PM. SOC2. OAuth2. US/AU/UK. Attorney-client privileged data.
